detection_gaps.description: Lack of visibility into cloud-based resources and activities
Insufficient monitoring of network connections and anomalous behavior

detection_gaps.vulnerability_exploited: Sensitive data exposure and insecure storage
detection_gaps.description: Lack of comprehensive data-centric security controls

recommendations.actionable_remediation: Implement comprehensive cloud security monitoring and logging
Enhance network traffic analysis and anomaly detection capabilities
Strengthen data protection and monitoring controls
Implement robust multi-factor authentication and user behavior analytics
Improve privileged access management and monitoring
